tools.name: 直跑楼梯
tools.description: 生成直跑楼梯，可设置踏步数、宽度、踏面、踢面
tools.icon: <svg viewBox='0 0 48 48' fill='none' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><path d='M6 42 L6 34 L14 34 L14 26 L22 26 L22 18 L30 18 L30 10 L38 10 L38 2 L42 2 L42 42 Z' fill='#e8f0fe' stroke='#4285f4' stroke-width='2' stroke-linejoin='round'/></svg>

tools.name: 旋转楼梯
tools.description: 生成旋转楼梯，可设置踏步数、半径、旋转角度
tools.icon: <svg viewBox='0 0 48 48' fill='none' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><path d='M24 44 C10 44 4 34 4 24 C4 14 14 4 24 4' stroke='#4285f4' stroke-width='2.5' fill='none' stroke-linecap='round'/><path d='M24 4 C34 4 44 14 44 24' stroke='#4285f4' stroke-width='2.5' fill='none' stroke-linecap='round' stroke-dasharray='4 3'/><circle cx='24' cy='24' r='4' fill='#4285f4'/><line x1='24' y1='8' x2='24' y2='2' stroke='#4285f4' stroke-width='2'/><line x1='24' y1='2' x2='28' y2='6' stroke='#4285f4' stroke-width='2'/></svg>
